# Juniper Networks: A Leader in AI Networking, Cloud, & Connected Security Solutions

>Proven AI for your network. Mist, the AI-native networking platform makes every connection more reliable, measurable, and secure for businesses.

## Company Information 
- [Hewlett Packard Enterprise and Juniper Networks Strongly Oppose Department of Justice’s Decision to File Suit to Block Acquisition](https://newsroom.juniper.net/news/news-details/2025/Hewlett-Packard-Enterprise-and-Juniper-Networks-Strongly-Oppose-Department-of-Justices-Decision-to-File-Suit-to-Block-Acquisition/default.aspx): Proposed Acquisition Drives Innovation for Customer Solutions, Enhances an Already Competitive Market, and Fortifies U.S. National Security and the American “Core Tech” Sector Companies Plan to Vigorously Defend the Transaction in Court Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) and Juniper Networks, Inc. (NYSE:JNPR) today responded to the filing of a complaint by the U.S. Department of Justice seeking to prohibit closing of HPE’s proposed acquisition of Juniper: “We believe the Department of Justice

## Products and Solutions 
### Networking Solutions 
- [Enterprise Routing](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/enterprise-routing.html): Deliver experience-first connectivity across data center, campus, branch, WAN edge, and multicloud locations with enterprise AI-native routing solutions from Juniper Networks.
- [Artificial Intelligence for IT Operations (AIOps) Solutions](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/artificial-intelligence-for-it-operations-aiops.html): Transform your IT operations with AI, ML, and modern data science techniques while optimizing the value of your network infrastructure with Juniper AIOps.
- [Marvis AI Assistant](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/marvis-ai-assistant.html): Meet Marvis, the industry’s first conversational AI assistant for optimizing user and operator experiences through self-driving network operations.
- [Wired Access & Campus Solutions](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/wired-access.html): Optimize operations, enhance experiences, and scale with AI-Native, secure switching featuring NAC, Juniper Mist Wired Assurance, and EX switches.
- [Wireless Access Solution](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/wireless-access.html): Experience the network designed for the modern enterprise. AI, machine learning, and cloud technologies deliver faster deployments, optimized wireless experiences, and simplified network operations.
- [SD-WAN Solutions](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/sd-wan.html): Juniper AI-driven SD-WAN delivers optimized, experience-first networking through AIOps, ensuring each operation is simplified and every network is secure.
- [Data Center Assurance](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/network-automation/data-center-assurance.html): Data Center Assurance addresses a range of data center operation challenges with capabilities expanding beyond network to granular application assurance.
- [Explainable AI](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/dm/explainable-ai.html): Learn how explainable AI helps Juniper Mist AI solve common networking challenges while building trust and confidence in AI and AIOps.
- [Ops4AI Lab](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/data-center/ai-infrastructure/ops4ai-lab.html): Juniper’s AI data center solution is the fastest and most flexible way to deploy high-performing AI training, inference, and storage clusters. Customers can validate the performance and functionality of AI-optimized Ethernet switching for their data center network use cases in the lab in Juniper’s Sunnyvale, CA headquarters.
- [Secure AI-Native Edge](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/secure-ai-native-edge.html): Safeguard your users, applications, and infrastructure by securely transitioning to a SASE architecture with Juniper’s Secure AI-Native Edge.
 
### Security Solutions 
- [Juniper Mist Access Assurance](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/access-assurance.html): Discover Juniper Mist Access Assurance, a service that provides secure wired and wireless network access control based on user and device identities.
- [Threat Detection and Mitigation](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/threat-detection-and-mitigation.html): Automatically address attacks as they happen—before any damage is done—using actionable threat intelligence provided by Juniper security services.
- [Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) Solutions](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/secure-ai-native-edge/sase.html): Transition seamlessly and securely to a SASE architecture with Juniper Connected Security that safeguards your users, applications, and infrastructure.
- [Juniper Advanced Threat Prevention Products](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/security/advanced-threat-prevention.html): Explore Juniper Advanced Threat Prevention (ATP), a threat intelligence hub for your network, containing AI and ML-powered security services for early attack detection and networkwide policy enforcement.
- [Security Director Network Security Management](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/security/security-director-network-security-management.html): Quickly identify threats and remediate them with Junos Space Security Director, a network security and policy management software that empowers security teams.
- [Secure Edge](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/security/secure-edge.html): Juniper Secure Edge offers cloud-delivered firewall solutions with enhanced edge security, application control, IPS, anti-malware, web filtering, and ATP.
- [SRX4300 Firewall](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/security/srx-series/srx4300-enterprise-firewall.html): The SRX4300 next-gen firewall, deployable in distributed security services fabric, protects small and midsize networks with built-in zero-trust capabilities, EVPN-VXLAN configuration support, and AI-predictive Threat Prevention.
- [SRX1600 Firewall ](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/security/srx-series/srx1600-data-center-and-enterprise-firewall.html): The SRX1600 next-gen firewall, deployable in distributed security services fabric, protects enterprise campus networks and serves as a perimeter firewall in small and midsized data centers.
- [SRX4700 Firewall](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/security/srx-series/srx4700-cloud-service-provider-firewall.html): The SRX4700 Firewall, deployable in distributed security services fabric, offers high-performance security for mobile, data center, and edge networks for service providers.
- [SRX2300 Firewall](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/security/srx-series/srx2300-enterprise-firewall.html): The SRX2300 next-gen firewall, deployable in distributed security services fabric, protects small and midsized campus, data center, and regional headquarters networks.
- [Next-Generation Firewall Services](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/security/next-generation-firewall-services.html): Learn how Next Generation Firewall Services from Juniper Networks defends you from cyber attacks by blocking advanced malware from entering your network.
 
### Data Center Solutions 
- [Data Center Solutions](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/data-center.html): Design, deploy, and operate easy-to-manage data center networks and AI infrastructure with Juniper Networks’ data center solutions, featuring Apstra Data Center Director.
- [Data Center Networks](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/data-center.html): Juniper helps you modernize and automate your data center infrastructure and operations to achieve deep data insights, assured reliability, and unparalleled speed.
- [Cloud-Native](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/data-center/cloud-native.html): The Juniper cloud-native solution goes beyond basic connectivity, offering reliability and security with real-time monitoring, analytics and machine learning, so DevOps teams can focus on application innovation.
- [Zero Trust Data Center Security Solution](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/data-center/zero-trust-data-center.html): Juniper’s Zero Trust Data Center security solution uses a distributed security services architecture to protect data at every point of connection.
- [Data Center Interconnect](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/data-center/data-center-interconnect.html): Simplify network operations, avoid vendor lock-in, and interconnect your data centers. High-capacity coherent optics and DCI-optimized packet, security and virtualization software, and hardware.
 
### WAN Solutions 
- [Automated, High-Performing, Sustainable WAN Solutions for the AI Era](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/wan.html): Harness robust 400GbE and 800GbE capabilities in Juniper's AI-native routing solution to transform your network and meet evolving needs.
- [Cloud and Service Provider WAN](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/cloud-and-service-provider-wan.html): Discover how Juniper enables service providers worldwide to transform their networks into experience-centric, scalable, sustainable, and automated WANs.
- [Juniper Paragon](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/automation/paragon.html): Learn about the Juniper Paragon portfolio of network automation products designed to deliver speed, agility, and best-in-class service experiences.
 
### Switches 
- [QFX5700 Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5700-ethernet-switches.html): The QFX5700 switches offer a versatile platform that supports very large, dense and fast 400GbE IP fabrics, while also offering a choice of interface speeds for server and intra-fabric connectivity.
- [QFX5110 Ethernet Switch](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5110-ethernet-switch.html): QFX5110 10/40GbE switches offer flexible deployment options and rich automation features for data center and campus deployments that require low-latency Layer2/Layer 3 features and advanced EVPN-VXLAN capabilities.
- [QFX5230 Switch](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5230-data-center-switches.html): The QFX5230, a 64 x 400GbE data center switch, is ideal for high-speed, high-density spine-and-leaf IP fabrics, particularly in AI data center networking.
- [QFX5120 Data Center Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5120-data-center-switches.html): The QFX5120 series switches have software features that support modern IP fabric architectures with EVPN-VXLAN and work with Juniper Apstra and the Juniper Mist Cloud to automate and simplify operations in your data center network.
- [QFX5210 Data Center Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5210-data-center-switches.html): The QFX5210 line of switches offer flexible interfaces for server and intrafabric connectivity, making them an ideal choice for lean spine-and-leaf deployments in enterprise, service provider, and cloud provider data centers.
- [QFX5240 Switch](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5240-data-center-switches.html): Meet the foundation of your AI data center. The QFX5240 Switch from Juniper Networks provides 800GbE—twice the capacity of the previous generation.
- [QFX5100 Series 10/25/40/100GbE Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5100-series-10-25-40-100gbe-switches.html): The QFX5100 Series are access & top-of-rack 10/25/40/100GbE switches, optimized for application delivery & virtualized data centers.
- [EX4400-24X Ethernet Switch](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/ex-series/ex4400-24x-ethernet-switch.html): The AI-driven, cloud-native EX4400-24X ethernet switch is compact, scalable, and ideal for enterprise campus distribution deployments.
- [QFX5200 Data Center Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5200-data-center-switches.html): Learn about QFX5200 switches. The QFX5200-48Y is ideal for 25GbE access/leaf deployments with a 100GbE spine. The QFX5200-32C is ideal for leaf deployments in IP fabric networks. The QFX5210-64C is ideal for lean spine deployment in data centers.
- [QFX5220 Data Center Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5220-data-center-switches.html): The QFX5220 line is an optimal choice for spine-and-leaf deployments in enterprise, service provider, and cloud provider data centers, as well as routing use cases in metro environments.
- [QFX10002 Spine & Core Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx10002-spine-and-core-switches.html): Learn about the QFX10002 data center spine & core switches, powered by Juniper Q5 ASIC. QFX10002 switches offer superior logical scale—up to 2 million FIB entries & up to 2 million host routes, delivering the capacity you need as your data center requirements grow and change.
- [QFX5130 Ethernet Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx5130-ethernet-switches.html): The QFX5130 line of switches offers 10/25/40/100/400GbE interface options, making it an optimal choice for spine-and-leaf deployments in enterprise, service provider, and cloud provider environments.
- [QFX10008 & QFX10016, Spine & Core Switches](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/switches/qfx-series/qfx10000-qfx10008-qfx10016-spine-and-core-switches.html): Learn about the QFX10008 & QFX10016 data center spine & core switches, powered by Juniper Q5 ASIC. QFX10000 switches scale from 3 to 96 Tbps of throughput, supporting today’s most demanding data center and cloud environments.
 
### Routers 
- [Session Smart Router](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/routers/session-smart-router.html): Overcome inefficiencies and cost constraints with the Juniper Session Smart Router, enabling agile, secure, and resilient SD-WAN connectivity.
- [ACX7020 Cloud Metro Routers](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/routers/acx-series/acx7000-family-cloud-metro-routers/acx7000-line/acx7020.html): Discover the ACX7020 Cloud Metro Router delivering top access performance and support for segment routing, SRv6, MPLS, and EVPN.
- [ACX7348 Cloud Metro Router](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/routers/acx-series/acx7000-family-cloud-metro-routers/acx7300-line/acx7348-and-acx7332.html): Learn more about the ACX7348 Cloud Metro Router including the advanced features it supports, customer implementation success, technical documentation, and additional resources here.
- [ACX7509 Cloud Metro Router](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/routers/acx-series/acx7000-family-cloud-metro-routers/acx7500-line/acx7509.html): The ACX7509 Cloud Metro Router, ideal for service providers, large enterprise, and data center networks, provides ample capacity to accommodate service growth, cloud expansion, and hyperscaler applications.
- [ACX7024 and ACX7024X Cloud Metro Routers](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/routers/acx-series/acx7000-family-cloud-metro-routers/acx7000-line/acx7024-and-acx7024x.html): The ACX7024 Cloud Metro Router provides industry leading access performance and supports advanced features such as Segment Routing, SRv6, MPLS, and EVPN-VXLAN making it ideal for metro access applications.
- [PTX10002-36QDD Packet Transport Router](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/routers/ptx-series/ptx10002-36qdd-packet-transport-router.html): Explore the PTX10002-36QDD, an ultra-compact routing solution that delivers unmatched performance with dense 100GbE, 400GbE, and 800GbE support.
- [ACX7100 Series Routing and Switching Platform](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/routers/acx-series/acx7000-family-cloud-metro-routers/acx7100-line/acx7100.html): The ACX7100 Series routers are a high-capacity, high-density, low-latency routing and switching platform that are Ideal for metro and data center applications.
- [PTX10000, PTX10004, PTX10008 and PTX10016 Packet Transport Routers](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/routers/ptx-series/ptx10000-ptx10004-ptx10008-and-ptx10016-packet-transport-routers.html): The Juniper Networks PTX10000 network router family delivers 400GE and 800GE performance while supporting a broad spectrum of WAN and data center use cases.
 
### Access Points 
- [AP34 Access Point](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/access-points/ap34-access-point.html): The Juniper AP34 is a Wi-Fi 6E access point that automates network operations and boosts performance in the 6GHz band, while delivering real-time network data and asset location services.
- [AP64 Access Point](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/access-points/ap64-access-point.html): Learn about the Juniper AP64 series, our smallest weather-resistant Wi-Fi 6E access point, built for business continuity in any environment.
- [AP43](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/access-points/ap43-access-point.html): The AP43 Series is a tri-radio 4×4 802.11ax Access Point with maximum data rates of 2,400 Mbps in the 5GHz band and 1,148 Mbps in the 2.4GHz band.
- [AP24 Access Point](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/access-points/ap24-access-point.html): Discover the Juniper AP24 access point, integrating support for 802.11ax, Mist AI™, and an omnidirectional Bluetooth® LE (BLE) antenna to automate network operations and boost performance in the 6-GHz band.
- [AP24 Access Point](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/access-points/ap24-access-point.html/): Discover the Juniper AP24 access point, integrating support for 802.11ax, Mist AI™, and an omnidirectional Bluetooth® LE (BLE) antenna to automate network operations and boost performance in the 6-GHz band.
 
### Cloud Services 
- [Marvis AI Assistant for Data Center](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/marvis-ai-assistant/marvis-ai-assistant-for-data-center.html): Marvis AI Assistant for Data Center combines a natural-language interface with a powerful GenAI framework to improve insight, speed, and reliability.
- [Wi-Fi Assurance](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/wi-fi-assurance.html): Wi-Fi Assurance, driven by machine learning, replaces manual troubleshooting tasks with automated wireless operations.
- [User Engagement](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/user-engagement.html): We flipped the indoor location model on its head. With patented virtual Bluetooth LE (vBLE), indoor location services are finally easy to deploy and scale, with unprecedented accuracy and agility.
- [Juniper Mist Routing Assurance](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/routing-assurance.html): Juniper Mist Routing Assurance extends Mist AI™ to the WAN, giving enterprises unparalleled visibility and control over network infrastructure.
- [Visibility Services](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/asset-visibility.html): With our patented virtual Bluetooth LE technology, the same infrastructure for engaging with mobile users can be used for asset visibility.
- [WAN Assurance Cloud Service](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/wan-assurance.html): Simplify operations, improve productivity, and increase reliable and consistent performance at scale for your SD-WAN with Juniper Mist WAN Assurance.
- [Marvis Minis](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/marvis-ai-assistant/marvis-minis.html): Explore the capabilities of Marvis Minis, the only AI-native networking Digital Experience Twin, designed to validate network configurations and detect problems.
- [Marvis Client](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/marvis-ai-assistant/marvis-client.html): Meet Marvis Client, a versatile software agent designed to provide in-depth Wi-Fi network insights from the end user point of view.
- [Premium Analytics](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/cloud-services/premium-analytics.html): Juniper Premium Analytics cloud service provides enterprises network and security visibility and business insights to drive digital transformation.
- [Marvis AI](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/marvis-ai.html): Discover how the Marvis AI engine powers the Mist platform to optimize user experiences and streamline operations across the Juniper portfolio.
 
### Additional Products 
- [JCO400 Coherent Pluggable Transceivers](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/pluggable-optics/jco-series/jco400-coherent-optical-transceiver.html): The JCO400 Coherent Pluggable Transceivers enable operators and service providers to achieve their 400G transformation strategies.
- [Apstra Data Center Director](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/network-automation/apstra-data-center-director.html): Learn about Apstra Data Center Director, fabric management and automation software for designing, deploying, and operating data center networks.
- [Juniper RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC)](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/network-automation/ran-intelligent-controller.html): Discover the Juniper RIC platform, based on a cloud-native microservices architecture and fully compliant with O-RAN Alliance specifications and interfaces.
- [JCO100 Coherent Pluggable Transceivers ](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/products/pluggable-optics/jco-series/jco100-coherent-optical-transceiver.html): Juniper JCO100 Coherent Pluggable transceivers are built to deliver the TCO benefits of IPoDWDM to campus, branch, metro, and service edge networks.
 
## What is Research Topics 
- [Research Topics](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics.html): Quickly learn the definitions of key networking technologies and how Juniper Networks incorporates these technologies into products and solutions.
- [What is IDS and IPS?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-ids-ips.html): Intrusion detection systems (IDS) and intrusion prevention systems (IPS) are security measures deployed in your network to detect and stop potential incidents.
- [What is VXLAN?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-vxlan.html): VXLAN is the most commonly used protocol to create overlay networks enabling the use of a virtual network of switches, routers, firewalls & load balancers.
- [What is the difference between IPv4 and IPv6?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-ipv4-vs-ipv6.html): IPv4 was the first stable version of Internet Protocol. IPv6 is the most recent version & is intended to replace IPv4. Currently they are tightly mingled—most engineers run them together.
- [What is EVPN-VXLAN in an enterprise network?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-evpn-vxlan.html): EVPN-VXLAN provides large enterprises a common framework to manage their campus and data center networks with efficient and scalable Layer 2/Layer 3 network connectivity.
- [What Is an Access Point in Networking?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-an-access-point-in-networking.html): An access point (AP) is a term used for a network device that bridges wired and wireless networks.
- [What is a Passive Optical Network (PON)?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-pon.html): A passive optical network, or PON, uses fiber-optic technology to deliver data from one point to multiple endpoints. Here’s exactly how it works.
- [What is 802.1X Network Access Control (NAC)?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-802-1x-network-access-control.html): 802.1X network access control enables administrators to provide uniform access control across wired & wireless networks.
- [What is a network switch?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-a-network-switch.html): Learn how a network switch connects users, applications, and IT devices across a network so that they can communicate with one another and share resources.
- [What is Open RAN?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-open-ran.html): An open radio access network (Open RAN) is a framework that allows service providers the use of non-proprietary, interoperable, and intelligent subcomponents.
- [What is a router?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-a-router.html): A router is a gateway that passes data between one or more local area networks (LANs).
- [What is segment routing?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-segment-routing.html): Segment routing (SR) is a source-based routing technique that simplifies traffic engineering and management across network domains.
- [What Is a RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC)?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-ric.html): A RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC) is a software-defined component of the Open Radio Access Network (Open RAN) architecture that’s responsible for controlling and optimizing RAN functions.
- [What is Metro Ethernet?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-metro-ethernet.html): Metro Ethernet is an Ethernet transport network that provides point-to-point or multipoint connectivity services over a metropolitan area network (MAN).
- [What is artificial intelligence (AI) for networking?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-ai-for-networking.html): Learn how artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), and deep learning (DL) play a role in modern networking.
- [What is Intent Based Networking?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-intent-based-networking.html): Intent-based networking makes it possible for users to describe the business outcomes they’d like to accomplish and for the network to configure itself automatically to achieve them.
- [What Is a Data Center Network? ](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-a-data-center-network.html): A data center network consists of switches, routers, and other hardware components that work together to provide the connectivity and security needed to run applications and process data.
- [What is Wi-Fi 6E?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-wi-fi-6e.html): Learn all about Wi-Fi 6E, an upcoming standard for an extension of Wi-Fi 6. Discover how it impacts user experience, how it works, the benefits, FAQs, and more.
- [What is SD-WAN (Software-Defined Wide-Area Network)?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-sd-wan.html): A software-defined wide-area network (SD-WAN) is an automated, programmatic approach to managing enterprise network connectivity and circuit costs.
- [What is policy-based routing?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-policy-based-routing.html): Policy based routing (PBR) is a technique that forwards and routes data packets based on policies or filters. The goal of policy based routing is to make the network as agile as possible. By defining routing behavior based on application attributes, PBR provides flexible, granular traffic-handling capabilities for forwarding packets.
- [What is SDN?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-sdn.html): SDN is an approach to network virtualization that optimizes network resources & quickly adapt networks to changing business needs, applications & traffic.
- [What is a data center fabric?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-data-center-fabric.html): Data center fabric is a system of switches, servers & the interconnections between them, represented as a fabric and allows for a flattened architecture.
- [What is multi-access edge computing?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-multi-access-edge-computing.html): Multi-access edge computing (MEC) moves the computing of traffic and services from a centralized cloud to the edge of the network and closer to the customer.
- [What is virtual Bluetooth LE (vBLE) technology?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-virtual-bluetooth-le-vble-technology.html): Virtual Bluetooth LE (vBLE) is a patented technology for indoor location-based services that uses virtual beacons rather than physical beacons to more precisely and affordably locate devices containing BLE sensors.
- [What is AI-Native Networking?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-ai-native-networking.html): AI-native networking refers to computer networking systems that are conceived and developed with AI integration as a core component.
- [What is a cloud microservice?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-a-cloud-microservice.html): Cloud microservices is an architectural method of developing software applications or functions as a distributed set of independently deployable and manageable modules that run various application services.
- [What is 400G?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-400g.html): 400G is the next generation of cloud infrastructure. With a fourfold increase in maximum data transfer speed over 100G, 400G addresses the massive bandwidth demands being placed on network infrastructure providers.
- [What is unified threat management?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-utm.html): Unified threat management (UTM) provides multiple security features (anti-virus, anti-spam, content filtering, and web filtering) in a single device or service on the network to protect users from security threats.
- [What is quality of service?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-qos.html): Quality of Service (QoS) is a process that enables a router or switch to differentiate traffic types & then apply appropriate behaviors to the traffic.
- [What Is AI Data Center Networking?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-ai-data-center-networking.html): AI data center networking refers to the data center networking fabric that enables artificial intelligence (AI).
- [What is firewall design?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-firewall-design.html): Firewall design includes an organization’s overall security policy decisions such as which firewall features to use, where to enforce the firewall, and, ultimately, how to configure the firewall.
- [What is an NRE?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-nre.html): A network reliability engineer (NRE) is an IT operations role that applies an engineering approach to measuring and automating the reliability of the network to align with service-level objectives, agreements, and goals of the IT organization and business.
- [What is Wi-Fi 7](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-wi-fi-7.html): Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be), the latest standard from the Wi-Fi Alliance, succeeds Wi-Fi 6/6E with new technologies to reduce latency, boost capacity, and improve efficiency.
- [What is Security Virtualization?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-security-virtualization.html): Security virtualization is the process that ensures that multiple virtual instances of a device running a single physical hardware resource are protected.
- [SD-WAN Explained](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/sd-wan-explained.html): Want to learn more about SD-WAN. The topics include: SD-WAN explained, a new approach, and the keys to SD-WAN.
- [What is network security management?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-network-security-management.html): Network security management allows an administrator to manage a network consisting of physical and virtual firewalls from one central location.
- [What is Network Functions Virtualization (NFV)?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-network-functions-virtualization-nfv.html): Network Functions Virtualization (NFV) abstracts network functions, allowing software on standardized compute nodes to install & control them.
- [What is AIOps?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-aiops.html): AIOps, a Gartner term, refers to IT platforms and processes using artificial intelligence to enable faster, more accurate decision making and improved incident response.
- [What is SIEM?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-siem.html): SIEM software centrally collects, stores, and analyzes logs from perimeter to end user, and monitors for security threats in real time. When an attack occurs in a network using SIEM, the software provides insight into all the IT components (gateways, servers, firewalls).
- [What is DevNetOps?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-devnetops.html): DevNetOps is the application of DevOps philosophies, principles, and behaviors to network operations (NetOps). DevNetOps is implemented by the network reliability engineer (NRE) role.
- [What is Network Automation?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-network-automation.html): Network automation is the process of automating the configuration, management, testing, deployment & operations of physical & virtual devices in a network.
- [What is hybrid mesh security? ](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-hybrid-mesh-security.html): Hybrid mesh security, which is inclusive of hybrid mesh firewall platforms, is an architecture that bridges on-premises and cloud-native security through a single control point.
- [What is software as a service (SaaS)?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-saas-software-as-a-service.html): Software as a service, or SaaS, is a cloud-based solution that gives users access to applications and programs virtually over the Internet. The cloud provider takes care of application deployment, maintenance, troubleshooting, and updates, while users pay “as they go” based on usage.
- [What is application visibility and control?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-application-visibility-and-control.html): Application visibility & control functionality protects networks against application-level threats that can penetrate and proliferate in the network.
- [What is Spyware?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-spyware.html): Spyware is software that can secretly record your activity on your computer. Most commonly, it is delivered through a free download or from an infected email attachment; this is known as a Trojan horse.
- [What is SD-Branch?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-sd-branch.html): An SD-Branch is an architecture and abstraction of the functions of branch IT services that include WAN, LAN, and network security.
- [What is Explainable AI (XAI)?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-explainable-ai-xai.html): Explainable AI is a set of processes and methods that allows users to understand and trust the results and output created by AI’s machine learning algorithms.
- [What is Wi-Fi 6?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-wi-fi-6.html): Wi-Fi 6, which corresponds to an interoperability certification program managed by the Wi-Fi Alliance, Wi-Fi 6 CERTIFIED™, is the latest evolution in Wi-Fi technologies and is based on a draft of the forthcoming IEEE standard, 802.11ax
- [What is Advanced Threat Prevention?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-advanced-threat-prevention.html): Advanced Threat Prevention (ATP) detects, analyzes, and prevents threats from malware that has evolved to bypass traditional security methods.
- [What Is SASE? ](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-sase.html): SASE is a cybersecurity framework that combines wide area networking (WAN) capabilities with security services to support modern organizations.
- [What is 5G?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-5g.html): 5G is the next wireless network standard. It delivers higher data speeds, improved network efficiency, and supports more users while reducing latency.
- [What is an Adaptive Security Policy?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-adaptive-security-policy.html): An adaptive security policy allows administrators to quickly adapt to the ever-changing security landscape to ensure they can protect their networks with minimal time and effort.
- [What is AI-native routing?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-ai-native-routing.html): AI-Native routing puts AI at the center of provisioning, assuring, managing, and optimizing networks and network services.
- [What is multicloud?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-multicloud.html): Multicloud is a cloud computing deployment model that enables organizations to deliver application services across multiple private and public clouds containing any combination of multiple cloud vendors, multiple cloud accounts, multiple cloud availability zones, or multiple cloud regions or premises.
- [What is digital transformation?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-digital-transformation.html): Digital Transformation optimizes the value of organizational data by creating contextual intelligence from it to drive business value. Data is at the heart of digital transformation. Data must be easily and reliably accessible, automated in collection, delivery, and execution, and secure.
- [What is secure retail?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-secure-retail.html): Secure Retail is a seamless point-of-sale (POS) solution that retail enterprises can use to mitigate cybersecurity threats across their private and public networks.
- [Wifi Explained](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/wifi-explained.html): Explore a comprehensive, curated set of Wi-Fi learning resources in an accessible format so you can find quickly the information you’re looking.
- [What is a self-driving network?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-a-self-driving-network.html): A self-driving network is an advanced, artificial intelligence (AI)-driven network that can automatically optimize itself with minimal to no human intervention.
- [What is DevOps?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-devops.html): DevOps is an IT best practices methodology that brings developers and operations together to rapidly develop and deliver new software features and services.
- [What Is Experience-First Networking?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-experience-first-networking.html): Juniper Networks appreciates the importance of putting the customer’s experience first, especially in networking and communication. Discover how we apply our Experience-First Networking foundation to improve overall customer satisfaction.
- [What is Network Security?](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/what-is-network-security.html): Using both hardware and software, network security protects the access, usability, and data integrity of your network across all physical and virtual elements of the core network.

## Industries Served 
- [Government](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/industries/government.html): Transform government networking with Juniper’s AI-Native Platform, enhancing security, efficiency, and innovation for federal, state and local agencies.
- [Networking Solutions for Education](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/education.html): Juniper has earned the trust of schools to deliver networks with ample performance, reliability, and security to meet digital learning and business goals.
- [Healthcare and Life Sciences](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/industries/healthcare-and-life-sciences.html): Transform healthcare and life sciences with Juniper's AI-Native Networking, delivering reliable connectivity, security, and efficiency for seamless care.
- [Retail Networking and IT Solutions](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/industries/retail.html): Discover the future of retail networks with Juniper AI-Native Networking – streamline operations, boost productivity, and enhance customer experiences.
- [Energy Utilities](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/energy-utilities.html): Learn how Juniper’s connected security, automation, and SD-WAN solutions help energy and utility companies adopt new technologies, increase business agility, and deliver seamless user experiences.
- [Media, Broadcast, and Entertainment Solutions](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/media-and-entertainment.html): Juniper Networks offers a suite of technology solutions designed to address the solution requirements for media, entertainment, and broadcast companies.
- [Financial Services Solutions ](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/industries/financial-services.html): Explore Juniper’s low latency, high-performance network infrastructure solutions. Learn how they help reduce risks to financial institutions and lower networking costs.
- [Hospitality](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/solutions/industries/hospitality.html): Discover how Juniper Mist enhances hospitality with personalized guest experiences through real-time analytics seamless Wi-Fi, and reliable networks.
 
## Learning and Support 
- [Training and Certification](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/training.html): Ensure your team has the skills to build the best network with training and certification from Juniper Networks.
- [Get Started with Free Juniper Training](https://learningportal.juniper.net/juniper/user_activity_info.aspx?id=JUNIPER-OPEN-LEARNING&TrackId=jnet-nav): Juniper Open Learning Offering you a wealth of free, award-winning* learning options, to help you prepare for Juniper certification, transition from other platforms and learn new Juniper technologies.
- [Juniper Learning Portal - Home](https://learningportal.juniper.net/juniper/default.aspx?&TrackId=jnet-nav): Access free networking courses and discounted certifications, introductory through advanced technical training courses delivered online or live.
- [Support Services ](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/services/support-services.html): Discover our wide range of mission-critical support for Juniper hardware and software products designed to optimize network performance and reliability.
- [Juniper support](https://support.juniper.net/support/): Access product support and case management.
 
## Community and Events 
- [Elevate - Elevate Community](https://community.juniper.net/home): Official Juniper Networks Elevate Community. Learn, build, and share with peers. Connect with experts about our high-performance networking & cybersecurity solutions.
- [Juniper’s AI-Native NOW Event Series](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/events/ai-native-now.html): Juniper Networks’ AI-Native NOW events around the globe provide an easy way to see why you should care about our latest AI-Native Networking innovations.
- [AI-Native Healthcare Networking: Strengthen Operations, Scale Smarter](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/events/webinars/2025/ai-native-healthcare-networking-strengthen-operations-scale-smarter.html): Join healthcare IT leaders as they discuss how Mist, Juniper’s AI-native networking platform, is helping IT teams to strengthen operations and scale smarter.

- [Our next era as HPE Networking](https://www.juniper.net/us/en/research-topics/thought-leadership/our-next-era-as-hpe-networking.html): I’m excited to share that Juniper is now officially in its next era, as part of HPE.

This structured summary provides a comprehensive overview of Juniper Networks' offerings, company information, and resources available for users and partners.
